reviews.comment:
Buena atención y baños limpios. Mini mercado accesible y completo.  Si viaja de sur a norte prefiera esta estación a la Petrobras del cruce allí nunca tienen gas oil ni super. Sólo Premium.  El verso de no llego el camión!!

(Translated by Google)
Good service and clean restrooms. The mini-market is accessible and well-stocked. If you're traveling from south to north, choose this station over the Petrobras at the intersection; they never have diesel or regular. Only premium. The "the truck didn't arrive" excuse!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvMzhfWVB3EAE

(Translated by Google)
A break along the way, a good convenience store, refueling and recharging my energy to continue my journey

reviews.comment:
Parada habitual para mis viajes a la Patagoni a Argentina, via la ruta del desierto. Motel: normal para una noche. Restaurante: buenos precios y buenos platos. A veces tardan un poco con algunos platos, pero bueno para mi.

(Translated by Google)
A regular stop on my trips to Patagonia and Argentina, via the desert route. Motel: average for one night. Restaurant: good prices and good food. Sometimes they take a while to get some dishes, but that's fine by me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvbDZLT25BRRAB
